subcodes.first_line: O 'Ali-Haydar! Praise be unto God that thou hast turned unto Him and acknowledged the oneness of God, glorified be His majesty. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی حیدر لله الحمد اقبال نمودی و بوحدانیت حق جل جلاله اعتراف کردی طوبی از
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
